subject: Two abandoned interior rooms side by side — a clinical surgical suite and a deteriorated hospital room
description: A split-panel image showing two distinct but thematically linked interiors. On the left, a domed surgical theatre with a circular surgical table at center, overhead rigging suspending a large mechanical or bone-like implement (a surgical crane or instrument arm), draped white sheets or curtains lining the walls, and a small glow of greenish light through a distant opening — the room is ominous and sterile. On the right, a decayed patient room with a metal bed frame, a floor lamp, a cabinet, and large windows letting in cold grey light through peeling or deteriorating walls. Both rooms feel abandoned and contaminated, with a palette of grey, teal, and yellow-green. No figures are present — the horror here is the architecture itself.
foreground: Left panel: circular surgical table and hanging implement; Right panel: metal bed frame and floor lamp
background: Left panel: domed ceiling with rigging and curtained alcoves; Right panel: large windows with pale exterior light, peeling walls
